Coming Soon — UCSF

Sequence to Identification.
Pathogen Discovery at Scale.

SeqToID is a cloud-based metagenomic analysis platform operated by the University of California, San Francisco. No coding required — just upload your sequencing data and let the pipeline do the rest.

Join the Mailing List Learn More
No-Code No bioinformatics expertise needed
Secure Your raw data is never shared
UCSF Operated by UC San Francisco

Built for Researchers, Powered by UCSF

SeqToID brings together cutting-edge metagenomic pipelines and privacy-first data handling in a single, accessible platform.

Metagenomic Pipeline

Characterize microbes present in your samples — including viruses, bacteria, and eukaryotes — using our fully automated pipeline.

Fast & Scalable

Rapid, concurrent sample analysis directly from your laptop. No local compute infrastructure required.

Private & Secure

Raw sample data is never shared with other users. Human genetic sequences are filtered out before any analysis is stored.

Rich Visualizations

Heatmaps, phylogenetic trees, coverage visualizations, and taxonomic trees — all customizable and shareable.

Collaborative Research

Create projects, share report data with colleagues, and contribute to a global pathogen surveillance network.

AMR & Viral Pipelines

Dedicated pipelines for antimicrobial resistance detection and viral consensus genome assembly.

How SeqToID Works

From raw sequencing files to actionable pathogen reports in three simple steps.

01

Upload Your Data

Submit FASTQ files along with sample metadata such as collection date, host type, and tissue type. All human genetic sequences are automatically filtered and discarded.

02

Automated Pipeline Analysis

SeqToID's data pipeline performs quality control, host filtering, and database alignment to generate comprehensive interactive reports.

03

Explore & Share Results

Visualize identified pathogens, download reports, and optionally share findings with collaborators or the broader research community to advance global health surveillance.

Join Our Mailing List

Sign up to get the latest updates on our upcoming launch. We'll be in touch with news, access information, and registration details.

SeqToID is operated by UCSF.
